meaning: adj.马基雅弗利的,权谋术的n.权谋政治家
examples: "All politics grows out of the barrel of a gun," as a famous twentieth-century Machiavellian once put it.
This forms the hypocrisy of Machiavellian culture.
But these Machiavellian arguments are not the ones that Kosovar politicians use in public.
Such Machiavellian infighting would not get far if Clinton had Nunn as his secretary of state.
